name: item
description: The item (row data) to be rendered.

name: fields
description: The fields to be displayed as table cells.

name: domSelector
description: A precomputed dom selector used for the row's identifying class.

name: isHighlighted
description:
Resolves whether the row should be highlighted. Kept as a stable
function reference so the parent table's render does not subscribe to
selection state - only the affected row re-renders.

name: isDisabled
description: Resolves whether the row should be disabled.

name: idKey
description: The key to be used as the unique identifier for each row.

name: lazy
description: Determines if the row should be lazy loaded.

name: dragDrop
description: Determines if the row is draggable.

name: paddingX
description: The horizontal padding size of the row's cells.
